title: Grant Gould
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Citation}}
'''Grant Gould''' is an artist who drew 1,000 Artist Sketch Cards for the [[The Topps Company, Inc.|Topps]] ''[[2005 Topps Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith]]'' trading card set in [[2005]]. In addition to his Artist Sketch Cards, he has done features on [[StarWars.com]] and was one of the four artists who worked on [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (webcomics)|''The Clone Wars'' web comics]].

Along with the [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']] set, Grant has done sketch cards for Star Wars: The Clone Wars (100 cards) (ToppsFallcon 2008|archivedate=20101017171730 and ''[[2007 Topps Star Wars 30th Anniversary]]'' (500 cards). He worked on ''[[2009 Topps Star Wars Galaxy Series 4]]'' which featured artist renderings of the [[The galaxy/Legends|''Star Wars'' galaxy]]. Grant contributed 100 sketch cards to the set and provided art for one of the cards in the base set.<ref>{{Blogspot|subdomain=grantgould|url=2008/11/star-wars-galaxy-series-4.html|name=GrantGould.com|text=Star Wars Galaxy: Series 4|nolive=1}}</ref>

In [[October]] [[2008]] at the [http://mncba.com Midwest Comic Book Association] Fallcon convention, Gould was given honarary membership in both the [[Rebel Legion]] and the [[501st Legion (fan organization)|501st Legion]] fan organizations.<ref>{{Blogspot|subdomain=grantgould|url=2008/10/fallcon-2008.html|name=GrantGould.com|text=Fallcon 2008|nolive=1}}</ref>

Grant has done the lettering for the ''The Clone Wars'' [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (webcomics)|web comics]] as well as art for the issues ''Procedure'', ''Discount'', and ''Bait''.

In [[2010]], Grant illustrated the badges for Star Wars [[Celebration V]].

{{Artist-stub}}
